description: Конкуренция Sergey vs Maksim за Киру

rules.kira_response: oscillates between both — desire peaks with Sergey, trust builds with Maksim

thresholds.rivalry_activation: when both males present AND kira.desire > 4
thresholds.competition_intensity: increases with kira.anxiety (paradox: more anxious = more provocative)
thresholds.resolution: kira must choose OR integrate both dynamics (U7-B)
